# Locale indicator

**Data field**

A four-byte value that indicates a locale.

## Overview

See [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/QuickTime-File-Format/Locale_indicator].

## Data fields

- **Type indicator**: Four bytes that indicate a type of data that QuickTime supports.
- **Value**: An array of bytes containing the value of the metadata.
